_comment: Curated, original-voice paragon overviews (paraphrased from bloonswiki article leads, not copied verbatim — CC BY-NC-SA). Kept separate from the fetched stats/paragons/*.json so a stats re-fetch never clobbers them. Keyed by paragon_id.

descriptions.apex_plasma_master: Dart Monkey's Paragon, fusing Ultra-Juggernaut, Plasma Monkey Fan Club, and Crossbow Master. It rapidly fires volleys of three plasma juggernaut balls that each split into smaller juggernauts twice — up to ~36 projectiles per volley — all of which re-hit Bloons after ricocheting off walls. Despite the name the damage is Normal-type, with bonus damage to Ceramics and Bosses.
descriptions.glaive_dominus: Boomerang Monkey's Paragon, fusing Glaive Lord, Perma Charge, and MOAB Domination. It has three attacks: a main glaive that ricochets across the whole map and applies damage-over-time, three giant Orbital Glaives that spin around it for close-range coverage, and a periodic MOAB Press that stuns and crushes MOAB-class Bloons. Its Overcharge ability ramps up attack speed the longer it fires.
descriptions.ascended_shadow: Ninja Monkey's Paragon, fusing Grandmaster Ninja, Grand Saboteur, and Master Bomber. Its attacks — seeking shurikens, flash bombs, and a sabotage debuff — all deal bonus damage to Camo and Boss Bloons, and its projectiles can knock Bloons back. It also grants Camo detection to nearby paragons that lack it.
descriptions.navarch_of_the_seas: Monkey Buccaneer's Paragon, fusing Carrier Flagship, Pirate Lord, and Trade Empire. Six independent triple-barreled turrets each fire explosive cannonballs and a spray of grapeshot, while launched fighter-plane sub-towers strafe Bloons and missile MOAB-class targets. It also generates cash like a Trade Empire.
descriptions.goliath_doomship: Monkey Ace's Paragon, fusing Sky Shredder, Tsar Bomba, and Flying Fortress, and the priciest paragon at $900,000. It circles the map firing volleys of non-homing and homing missiles plus forward-facing twin dart streams, and its Carpet Bomb ability sends a trio of planes to blanket the track in bombs.
descriptions.master_builder: Engineer Monkey's Paragon, fusing Sentry Champion, Ultraboost, and XXXL Trap. It fires three nails that pin and stun most Bloons for 5 seconds, and permanently boosts its own attack speed by 30% at the end of each round. Its abilities deploy powerful Mega Sentries (Green, Red, or Blue) anywhere on the map.
descriptions.magus_perfectus: Wizard Monkey's Paragon, fusing Archmage, Wizard Lord Phoenix, and Prince of Darkness. It runs on a unique mana system: a primary mode spends mana on its Arcane Spike, Dark Phoenix, and Undead Bloons, while a secondary draining beam restores it. Its abilities detonate the Phoenix and merge it with the Wizard.
descriptions.nautic_siege_core: Monkey Sub's Paragon, fusing Energizer, Pre-emptive Strike, and Sub Commander. Surfaced, it fires bursting homing rockets and launches a heavy missile at every Bloon that enters the map; submerged, it pulses radioactive damage and buffs nearby Heroes and Monkey Subs. It can toggle between the two stances.
descriptions.crucible_of_steel_and_flame: Tack Shooter's Paragon, fusing Inferno Ring, Super Maelstrom, and The Tack Zone. It constantly spins four streams of white-hot blades that each burst into a nova of tacks, even with no Bloons in range, and its abilities extend blade lifespan and call down meteors. It needs Ascended Shadow to detect Camo.
descriptions.mega_massive_munitions_factory: Spike Factory's Paragon, fusing Super Mines, Carpet of Spikes, and Perma-Spike. It deploys giant spiked mines that last up to 5 rounds and split into smaller spike piles, and lays a permanent track-wide carpet of spikes that passively damages every Bloon. Its abilities are Controlled Burst (quadrupled attack speed) and Spikeageddon.
descriptions.ballistic_obliteration_missile_bunker: Bomb Shooter's Paragon (B.O.M.B.), fusing Bloon Crush, MOAB Eliminator, and Bomb Blitz. It slowly fires heavy homing missiles that stun and push Bloons, each spawning eight cluster bombs that spawn eight more — enough to peel a BAD layer in three shots by round 100. It can't see Camo without Ascended Shadow's detection.
descriptions.herald_of_everfrost: Ice Monkey's Paragon, fusing Super Brittle, Absolute Zero, and Icicle Impale. Its attack alternates between four high-pierce Ice Lance Beams — which freeze Bloons and leave damaging icicle shards — and a map-wide Snowstorm Roar that freezes, slows, and embrittles everything. An Arctic Wind aura slows nearby Bloons, and it creates global ice platforms for water placement.
descriptions.root_of_all_nature: Druid's Paragon, fusing Monarch of Storms, Spirit of the Forest, and Avatar of Wrath. Its Electrified Thorns ricochet between Bloons and speed up the longer it attacks, while a sentient forest carpets the track with damaging vines and grows storm trees that act as Banana Farms. Its Primordial Wrath ability toggles a high-damage state that drains cash.
